phases.decide: mod6=0 check PRs (GH unconfigured → skip); filed issue on inscription-escrow hardcoded testnet PK
phases.execute: gh issue create --title '[CRITICAL] Hardcoded testnet private key in deploy-testnet.mjs' --body ' SECURITY ALERT: Line 9 of deploy-testnet.mjs contains a hardcoded testnet private key. This is a testnet key but poses a risk if code is ever adapted for mainnet use. Recommendation: Use environment variables or a config file for any sensitive credentials. See https://github.com/dantrevino/inscription-escrow/issues/1'
